title: Xiaoguai Recipe
description: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for Xiaoguai agent recipe YAML files.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the recipe does.

owner.description: Team or role responsible for this recipe (e.g. 'platform-sre').

tags.description: Free-form labels for discovery and filtering.

config.description: Static operator-configurable knobs for this recipe. Values may reference env vars via '${VAR:-default}' syntax.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps. Parallelism is expressed via 'deps' (a step with no deps runs immediately; steps sharing a common dep may run in parallel).

requires.description: Declares external dependencies: packs, feature flags, and required environment variables.

packs.description: List of pack references with version constraints. Each entry is a single-key object: { 'pack-name': '>=1.0.0' }.

items.description: Single-entry map of pack-name to SemVer constraint string.
Map of pack-name to SemVer constraint string (e.g. { 'security-audit': '>=0.1.0' }). Idiomatic and consistent with pack.yaml depends block.

features.description: Feature flags that must be enabled in the workspace.

env.description: Environment variable names that MUST be set for the recipe to run.

env_optional.description: Environment variable names that are optional (recipe provides defaults).

trigger.description: Defines how the recipe is initiated.

event_bus.description: One or more xg-anomaly / xg-watch event bus subscriptions.

source.description: Config-ref or pack-namespaced slug of the AnomalySpec / WatchSpec.

manual.description: If true the recipe can only be started manually (no event source).

description.description: Human-readable explanation of when the trigger fires.

step.description: A single step in the recipe execution graph.

id.description: Unique identifier for this step within the recipe (snake_case).

name.description: Optional display name for the step.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this step does.

condition.description: Template expression evaluated at runtime; step is skipped if falsy.

deps.description: Step ids that must complete before this step starts.

inputs.description: Key-value map of inputs passed to this step. Values are template strings or literal scalars.

outputs.description: Key-value map of named output bindings produced by this step.

agent.description: Reference to a pack agent (string) or an inline agent definition.

output.description: Reference to a pack output adapter (string) or an inline output definition.

inline_agent.description: An agent defined inline within the recipe (no separate pack registration required).

inline.description: Local name for the inline agent.

timeout_seconds.description: Wall-clock timeout for the agent (integer seconds or template string).

system_prompt.description: System prompt text passed to the LLM.

context_steps.description: Ordered list of context-gathering mini-steps injected as LLM context.

llm_config.description: LLM invocation settings for an inline agent.

context_step.description: A context-gathering mini-step inside an inline agent.

id.description: Local name for the context slice.

data.description: Static or template-resolved data injected directly.

params.description: Keyword parameters passed to the named tool.

condition.description: Skip this context step if the template expression evaluates to false.

inline_output.description: An inline output adapter definition (e.g. a Slack webhook not backed by a pack).

message_template.description: Jinja2 message template rendered at runtime.

hotl_block.description: HotL (Human-on-the-Loop) gate configuration. Suspends execution and requests human approval.

policy.description: HotlPolicyStore slug that governs this gate.

gated_on.description: Boolean template expression; gate is activated only if truthy.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for human response.

blocking.description: If false, the gate runs asynchronously without halting the recipe (default: true).

audit.description: Write all approval events to the audit log (default: true).

context_for_approver.description: Structured data sent to the approver to inform their decision.

outcome_block.description: Records a structured outcome event to the OutcomeRecorder (feature: outcome-telemetry).

payload.description: Key-value map of fields written to agent_outcomes. Values are template strings or literal scalars.

condition_check_block.description: A gate step that evaluates a condition and exposes the result as an output rather than executing an agent.

condition.description: Boolean template expression; result exposed as '{{ <step_id>.passed }}'.

max_retries.description: Number of automatic retries before the on_failure action fires.

fallback.description: Literal fallback values injected into outputs when the step fails and on_failure is 'continue'.

fallback_priority.description: Convenience shorthand for a scalar fallback value (e.g. in classify step).

notify.description: Notification target invoked on failure (pack output reference, pack output reference with inline message, or inline adapter).

oneOf.description: Pack-namespaced output adapter reference (no inline message).
Pack-namespaced output adapter reference with an inline message template.

global_error_handler.description: Recipe-level fallback invoked when any step raises an unhandled error.

notify.description: Where to send the error notification.

message.description: Message template (may reference '{{ failed_step }}' and '{{ error.message }}').
